series_metadata.series_title: Training Agency and Course Applications and Renewals
series_metadata.series_description: Documents relating to the application for or renewal of training agencies approvals, initial licensing course approvals, or continuing education course approvals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed two years after submission. ; Electronic: The record shall be destroyed two years after submission., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
